author: Rabanus Maurus
title: De institutione clericorum libri III
editions: A. Knoepfler, ed., (Munich 1900); ed. Detlev Zimpel, 1996
remarks: son but evident est de donner a des intelligences moyennes une nourriture simple et claire, aisement memorisable. Like Isidore, he gives etymologies, also ecclesiastical history. See https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/traditio/article/new-insights-old-texts-clerical-formation-and-the-carolingian-renewal-in-hrabanus-maurus/946CA4B32F00E46983E7C9C23C103629
